headline: 5 ASCO Abstracts Moving Biopharma Stocks
summary:
The American Society of Clinical Oncology annual conference brings together oncology professionals, patient advocates, industry representatives, and major media outlets from across the globe.

This year's meeting is is scheduled for May 29-31 and is organized as a virtual event due to the lockdowns and stay-at-home restrictions necessitated by the COVID-19 pandemic.

headline: Commentary: Trade Flow And The Warning Flares It Signals
summary: The U.S. trade war with China and COVID-19 have reshaped the flow of supply and demand. While the trade war shifted the movement and volume of goods, the coronavirus has impacted the buying behavior of consumers. Now with the world in various stages of reopening, the big question that remains is will the consumer come roaring back?
